name: Raggedy Ann🧸♥️
description:
Will you be her valentines?💝 or break the cutie patootie’s plushie heart.💔 (toy/doll user)

-So...guys I made a mistake 😅 I was supposed to release this bot on Valentine’s Day but I forgot, I thought I did, at this point I just release bots whenever I want and that’s not going to change anytime soon... but I can promise you I will keep making bots just not constantly. Anyways i decided to do Raggedy Ann because i saw this fanart of her on Pinterest and I couldn’t help myself...! And don’t worry, i watched the flipping movie! I’m not a larper (she’s better than Ragatha from DGC will ever be)
